item.title: にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧…
item.author: ねこぱすー@sync (@aria-sync.bsky.social)
item.description:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
おはようございますんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日は朝から涼しい風が気持ちいいので今でも寝そう( ¯꒳​¯ )ᐝな所(*´ω｀*)
きんキラキラキラ金曜日なん🫓
今日も一日頑張るぞいو( ˙꒳˙ )٩
#おはようございます
#イマソラ
#空の向こう
item.content:encoded:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
おはようございますんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日は朝から涼しい風が気持ちいいので今でも寝そう( ¯꒳​¯ )ᐝな所(*´ω｀*)

#イマソラ
#空の向こう

item.title: ‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤 ‎ ‎ワシは… ‎アメリカ時間に ‎起きてる必要がある ‎ ‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から …
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎

item.title: ハヤカワ新書創刊3周年イベントのイラスト担当させていただきました。 3周年おめでとうございます！
item.author: Kouyou Kojima * コジマコウヨウ (@kouyou1-6.bsky.social)

item.title: The most interesting Fable tip I've heard so far is to let t…
item.author: Simon Willison (@simonwillison.net)
item.description:
The most interesting Fable tip I've heard so far is to let the model use its own judgement as much as possible

I told it "For all coding tasks use your judgement to decide an appropriate lower power model and run that in a subagent" and it seems to be saving tokens simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/3/j...
item.content:encoded:
The most interesting Fable tip I've heard so far is to let the model use its own judgement as much as possible

I told it "For all coding tasks use your judgement to decide an appropriate lower power model and run that in a subagent" and it seems to be saving tokens simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/3/j...

item.title: 『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳 早川書房）を御紹介します。 n…
item.author: Katz@PanTraductia (@katzptd.bsky.social)
item.description:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。
item.content:encoded:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。

item.title: バーニー・サンダース上院議員とアレクサンドリア・オカシオ＝コルテス下院議員は、AIデータセンター建設のモラトリアムを求め…
item.author: 星 暁雄 (Akio Hoshi) (@akiohoshi.bsky.social)
item.description:
バーニー・サンダース上院議員とアレクサンドリア・オカシオ＝コルテス下院議員は、AIデータセンター建設のモラトリアムを求める法案"the Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act"を提出。

「20MW以上の電力を消費し、液体冷却を採用し、定格出力20kW以上のラックを備え、AIモデルの大規模なトレーニングや運用に使用される施設」の建設や拡張の一時停止を求める。
item.content:encoded:
バーニー・サンダース上院議員とアレクサンドリア・オカシオ＝コルテス下院議員は、AIデータセンター建設のモラトリアムを求める法案"the Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act"を提出。

「20MW以上の電力を消費し、液体冷却を採用し、定格出力20kW以上のラックを備え、AIモデルの大規模なトレーニングや運用に使用される施設」の建設や拡張の一時停止を求める。

item.title: #Poetry #Painting #Morality The good and the evil are happe…
item.author: Art & Nature (@capecodfairytales.bsky.social)
item.description:
#Poetry #Painting #Morality

The good and the evil are happening concurrently.
The choice to focus on the good is itself
a way to defy the evil.

-Jared K Anderson

🎨 Claude Monet
item.content:encoded:
#Poetry #Painting #Morality

The good and the evil are happening concurrently.
The choice to focus on the good is itself
a way to defy the evil.

-Jared K Anderson

🎨 Claude Monet

item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)

Prince William popped by Travis and Jason Kelce's podcast 'New Heights,' with the episode arriving only hours before the Kansas City Chiefs player’s big wedding to Taylor Swift.

item.author: Mayor Zohran Kwame Mamdani (@mayor.nyc.gov)

item.title: The great American road trip is on. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4bnkyNg A…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description:
The great American road trip is on. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4bnkyNg

AAA forecast a record 61.4 million drivers are hitting the road the week of July Fourth, inching up from 61.3 million in 2025. Americans are getting some relief at gas pumps as they set out, too.
item.content:encoded:
The great American road trip is on. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4bnkyNg

AAA forecast a record 61.4 million drivers are hitting the road the week of July Fourth, inching up from 61.3 million in 2025. Americans are getting some relief at gas pumps as they set out, too.

item.title: 最近ストレスやばくなったら大きな声で 「ざるそば一丁！！！」っていって 相手が「？？？？」みたいな顔したら普通に話しは…
item.author: やまだいおり🐮とうぱに新宿御苑 (@panicyamada.bsky.social)
item.description:
最近ストレスやばくなったら大きな声で

「ざるそば一丁！！！」っていって
相手が「？？？？」みたいな顔したら普通に話しはじめてまたムカついたらまた大声で
「ざるそば一丁！！！！！」って言って本気でビビらせてる。⁉️って顔されるからおすすめ☺️
ちなみに2度と話しかけられなくなります。
item.content:encoded:
最近ストレスやばくなったら大きな声で

「ざるそば一丁！！！」っていって
相手が「？？？？」みたいな顔したら普通に話しはじめてまたムカついたらまた大声で
「ざるそば一丁！！！！！」って言って本気でビビらせてる。⁉️って顔されるからおすすめ☺️
ちなみに2度と話しかけられなくなります。

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com “If I think about America, if I …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“If I think about America, if I try to reduce it to something: It’s a place for everybody who wants better, who believes in equality, who believes in justice, who believes in fairness, who believes in opportunity,” Bryan Stevenson tells Ezra Klein.
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“If I think about America, if I try to reduce it to something: It’s a place for everybody who wants better, who believes in equality, who believes in justice, who believes in fairness, who believes in opportunity,” Bryan Stevenson tells Ezra Klein.

item.title: Fact: 80% of terrestrial biodiversity lives in forests. When…

item.content:encoded: Fact: 80% of terrestrial biodiversity lives in forests. When trees vanish, species vanish.

item.title: Borja Iglesias, delantero de la selección: "Decir que los fu…
item.author: Fonsi Loaiza (@fonsiloaizap.bsky.social)
item.description: Borja Iglesias, delantero de la selección: "Decir que los futbolistas no podemos hablar de política también es politizar el fútbol. Somos parte de la sociedad. Para criticar el fútbol femenino dicen que ellas no generan lo mismo. Pero Alexia Putellas genera más que yo"
item.content:encoded: Borja Iglesias, delantero de la selección: "Decir que los futbolistas no podemos hablar de política también es politizar el fútbol. Somos parte de la sociedad. Para criticar el fútbol femenino dicen que ellas no generan lo mismo. Pero Alexia Putellas genera más que yo"

item.title: I'll summarize this: Mamdani asked NYers to keep air conditi…
item.author: Jason Scott (@textfiles.com)
item.description:
I'll summarize this: Mamdani asked NYers to keep air conditioning at 78 degrees. A wave criticism hit online. A MSNBC broadcast pointed out the US Department of Energy recommends that 78 degree figure.

Immediately after, the US Department of Energy deleted 6,000 web pages related to energy saving.
item.content:encoded:
I'll summarize this: Mamdani asked NYers to keep air conditioning at 78 degrees. A wave criticism hit online. A MSNBC broadcast pointed out the US Department of Energy recommends that 78 degree figure.

Immediately after, the US Department of Energy deleted 6,000 web pages related to energy saving.

#BookSky

item.title: Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they …
item.author: Dr. Redfern Jon Barrett (@redfernjon.bsky.social)
item.description:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!
item.content:encoded:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!

item.title: After a week's break from #Bluesky, I am back from holidays …
item.author: Uta Feinstein (@utafeinstein.bsky.social)
item.description:
After a week's break from #Bluesky, I am back from holidays in Cornwall, UK. 💦
For #ForestFriday & #scape day, a canopy of one of the UK's ancient temperate rainforests. 🌿🌞🩵

#Nature #Photography #Forest #Trees #Naturephotography #summer
#treescape #treeclub #ECK
#EastCoastKin #PhotographersUnited
item.content:encoded:
After a week's break from #Bluesky, I am back from holidays in Cornwall, UK. 💦
For #ForestFriday & #scape day, a canopy of one of the UK's ancient temperate rainforests. 🌿🌞🩵

#Nature #Photography #Forest #Trees #Naturephotography #summer

item.title: Good Friday morning Blue Sky’s! “Alone we can do so little;…

item.content:encoded:

item.title: He walked into a shelter to pick a cat. The cat had other pl…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: He walked into a shelter to pick a cat. The cat had other plans, climbed right up, and picked him instead.
item.content:encoded: He walked into a shelter to pick a cat. The cat had other plans, climbed right up, and picked him instead.

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth addr…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.
item.content:encoded: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.

item.title: Did you know that the Fourth of July fireworks could put a d…
item.author: PETA (@peta.org)
item.description: Did you know that the Fourth of July fireworks could put a dog through this much fear and anxiety? 😔 When choosing how to celebrate, keep in mind that it should be fun for everyone, no matter the species!
item.content:encoded: Did you know that the Fourth of July fireworks could put a dog through this much fear and anxiety? 😔 When choosing how to celebrate, keep in mind that it should be fun for everyone, no matter the species!

item.title: I just made a slightly strangled noise. A relative texted me…
item.author: David Bowman (@dlbowman76.com)
item.description:
I just made a slightly strangled noise. A relative texted me "David, I found this at a garage sale. They want $30 for it. What do you think?"

It was a signed, true first-edition of "Salem's Lot" in immaculate condition.
item.content:encoded:
I just made a slightly strangled noise. A relative texted me "David, I found this at a garage sale. They want $30 for it. What do you think?"

It was a signed, true first-edition of "Salem's Lot" in immaculate condition.

item.title: Happy Friday! I hope you have a good day. #ForestFriday #ECK
item.author: Laurie Agard (@laurieagard.com)
item.description: Happy Friday! I hope you have a good day. #ForestFriday #ECK
item.content:encoded: Happy Friday! I hope you have a good day. #ForestFriday #ECK

item.title: There are also deep trenches, such as the Mariana Trench in …
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: There are also deep trenches, such as the Mariana Trench in the Pacific Ocean, which reaches depths of nearly 11,000 meters. These are some of the most extreme environments on the planet—high pressure, no sunlight... and yet, life still exists there.
item.content:encoded: There are also deep trenches, such as the Mariana Trench in the Pacific Ocean, which reaches depths of nearly 11,000 meters. These are some of the most extreme environments on the planet—high pressure, no sunlight... and yet, life still exists there.

item.title: Happy Friday and Happy Holiday Weekend! We had somewhat quie…
item.author: Paul Gundlach (@paulsgundlach.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Friday and Happy Holiday Weekend! We had somewhat quiet skies this morning but the ridges on the water created some very nice texture. Tap for full size, particularly since it's a vertical. I hope you have a great day!
item.content:encoded: Happy Friday and Happy Holiday Weekend! We had somewhat quiet skies this morning but the ridges on the water created some very nice texture. Tap for full size, particularly since it's a vertical. I hope you have a great day!

item.title: The Supreme Court dealt Big Brother a blow on Monday with a …
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
The Supreme Court dealt Big Brother a blow on Monday with a landmark ruling for digital privacy rights in Chatrie v. United States.

Justices agreed 6-3 that police need a warrant to search your location data.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court dealt Big Brother a blow on Monday with a landmark ruling for digital privacy rights in Chatrie v. United States.

Justices agreed 6-3 that police need a warrant to search your location data.
